transcription: Mora oa ka ( ea dilemo di tsheletseng) o na le lefito le leholo, le thata lesapong la hae la mastoid. E lebile tlhorong ea lesapo.
translation: My son (6 year old) has a large, hard knot on his mastoid bone.  It is towards the top of the bone.
reference: My son (6 year old) has a large, hard knot on his mastoid bone.  It is towards the top of the bone.
hypothesis: A young woman is facing a difficult choice. She loves Lefito, a tall and beautiful girl. She is also close to Thogonya.

transcription: Mahloko a boletsweng a etsahala haho sena kgathatseho ho hang hantse ke etsa tse tlwaelehileng bo fihla bo otla.
translation: The mentioned pains occur when there is no anxiety at all its when I am doing normal things and suddenly it hits.
reference: The mentioned pains occur when there is no anxiety at all its when I am doing normal things and suddenly it hits.
hypothesis: Mahloko a buletseng a etsa hala ha ho senagathetsa ho hang? Ha ntse ke etsa tsela e twaile ile, mbuhihla bohatla.

transcription: Hangata, ho molemo ho tshela leqhwa ka metsotso e ka bang leshome le metso e mehlano hora enngwe le enngwe ho fihlela sebaka sa ho ruruha le bohloko bo saka mme bohloko bo fokotseha.
translation: Usually, it is best to ice the area for about 15 mins every hour till the area of swelling and pain numbs and the pain reduces.
reference: Usually, it is best to ice the area for about 15 mins every hour till the area of swelling and pain numbs and the pain reduces.
hypothesis: Hangata ho molemo ho tshella lekwa, ka metšotso e ka bang le shumele metu e mehlano, hora engwe le engwe, ho fihlela sepaka sa ruruwa le bohloko, bo saka, mme bohloko bo foko tše.
